_comment: Per-repo capability manifest for vision-build (WF2). Gate commands mirror .github/workflows/ci.yml so a local pass predicts a green CI. WF2 runs these via a detached runner (long gates dodge the 10-min/agent Bash cap). Placeholders: {testIgnore} = flags excluding the milestone's not-yet-satisfied locked acceptance tests from a per-step regression run; {base} = merge base for changed-line coverage. scope:'step' runs after each implementation step (regression only); scope:'milestone' runs once after all steps (proves acceptance). required:false reports but never blocks. NOTE: vision-build has NOT yet been run against this repo — confirm these commands locally (uvx diff-cover network fetch; trivy/pyright availability) before the first launch.

lockedTestExclusion.note: pytest supports --ignore=<path>; default addopts already exclude deployment/live/slow markers

gates.command: uv run ruff check src/ tests/ && uv run ruff format --check src/ tests/
uv run pyright --outputjson src/ > /tmp/pyright.json || true; uv run python tools/pyright_ratchet.py /tmp/pyright.json tools/pyright_baseline.json
uv run pytest tests/unit --cov=src/sapphire_flow --cov-report=xml -q && uvx diff-cover coverage.xml --compare-branch={base} --fail-under=85
